en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: bulabulay mun a mapuljat. tucu a qadaw uri temulu a sinsi tjanumun tua anemaya a sepayuan a caucau nu qivu tua kakesain.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的排灣語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Paiwan language for food.

ab: pucucug mun tua kai nua sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, ini ku pucug. maqati sun a qivu a puita?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: inika ken a namakalangda, maqati sun a tjamezangal anan a pagalju?
ch: 我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: pacunu a pasamaza! kicualu tjanuaken a semupu a puita.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: A: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
A: It’s very well read.

ab: supu anga a puita. papezangalu anan.
en: A: Read it again. Please speak louder.
A: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, namadraudraw aken a masi inpic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.
B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kisedjamun tua siulaulaw nua i ljaqedi a su salasaladj.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pasedjami aken tua su siulaulaw uii?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
A: Class is over.

ab: patjemaza a tja kitulu tucu, ucevucevungi anga nu tjaivililj a niciu.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
